name: 168_A. Wizards and Demonstration
description:
Some country is populated by wizards. They want to organize a demonstration.

There are `n` people living in the city, `x` of them are the wizards who will surely go to the demonstration. Other city people (`n - x` people) do not support the wizards and aren't going to go to the demonstration. The city administration will react only to the demonstration involving at least `y` percent of the city people.

The wizards decided to create clone puppets which can substitute the city people on the demonstration. The city administration cannot tell the difference between a puppet and a person, so they will consider the city to be consisting of only `n` people.

Help the wizards and find the minimum number of clones to create so that the demonstration has no less than `y` percent of the city people.

## Input

The first line contains a single integer `t` (1 вЙ§ t вЙ§ 100) вАФ the number of test cases.

Each test case contains a single line with three space-separated integers `n`, `x`, `y` (1 вЙ§ n, x, y вЙ§ 10вБі, x вЙ§ n) вАФ the number of citizens in the city, the number of wizards and the percentage the administration needs.

> **Note:** `y` can exceed 100 percent, meaning the administration wants to see more people at the demonstration than actually live in the city (> n).

## Output

For each test case, print a single integer вАФ the minimum number of clones to create, so that the demonstration involved no less than `y` percent of `n`.

## Examples

**Input:**
```
3
10 1 14
20 10 50
1000 352 146
```

**Output:**
```
1
0
1108
```

## Note

In the first sample it is necessary that at least 14% of 10 people came to the demonstration. As the number of people should be integer, then at least two people should come. There is only one wizard living in the city and he is going to come. That isn't enough, so he needs to create one clone.

In the second sample 10 people should come to the demonstration. The city has 10 wizards. They will all come to the demonstration, so nobody has to create any clones.
